notes: v348 — PORTFOLIO REDESIGNED: EASIER TO READ, NO MORE LONG SCROLL. The 💼 Portfolio was one endless page — holdings, pending orders, stats and the value chart all stacked together. It's now split into four clean tabs: 📊 Holdings (your positions), ⏳ Pending (your waiting buy orders, with their own tab as you asked), 📜 History (closed trades), and 📈 Performance (the summary numbers, win-rate stats and the day-by-day value chart). Your headline numbers — Account, Cash, Reserved and Open P/L — now sit pinned in a strip at the top, visible on every tab. You can sort your holdings (P/L %, P/L $, Value, Name, or newest buy) with the new 'Sort by' picker. And each holding row is much shorter: the five buttons (target, stop, note, sell, part-sell) are tucked into a single ⋯ menu on the right — tap it for those actions; your target/stop/note still show under the share code. Nothing about your trades or numbers changed — it's purely a cleaner layout. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v348. ALSO RECENT — v347 — fixed slow/freezing loads (the whole-market recalculation no longer locks the screen). v346 — ⬆ Export data button is in both Simple and Advanced. v344 — pre-open orders (before 10am Sydney) fill the same day if the price is hit. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
